title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 171.101 - Board may provide facilities and services for pupils living on federal lands
text:
171.101.  Board may provide facilities and services for pupils living on federal lands. — The school board of a seven-director district may provide educational facilities and services for pupils residing on lands acquired by the federal government in the state of Missouri for military or other purposes.  The board may operate schools on federal lands adjoining the district if adequate plant facilities therefor are provided by the federal government.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 11-10) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 165.375) 
State aid for pupils residing on federal lands, 163.071
